word: G1617 - ἐκτενέστερον - ektenésteron - ek-ten-es'-ter-on - More earnestly

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκτενέστερον

- Transliteration: Ektenesteron

- Phonetic: ek-ten-es'-ter-on

- Definition:

1. more intently, more earnestly

- Origin: neuter of the comparative of G1618

- TDNT entry: 09:43,2

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Neuter of the compound of G1618; more intently: - more earnestly.
